item.name: Fat Moogle Bugle
item.description: One toot on this shiny horn and any adventurer's lifelong dream to ride upon a wooden bench hauled about by a potbellied moogle will be answered.

mount.name: Fat Moogle
mount.action: Summon forth the fat moogle. How can he fly? Because magic. How can he fly bearing two riders? MAGIC.
mount.description: This plus-sized patrician epitomizes the ancient moogle proverb regarding kupo nuts that says, “Once you kupop, you cannot stop.” Basic laws of physics suggest that wings as small as the fat moogle's should not provide enough lift for true flight...yet here we are.
mount.tooltip:
Yet what was thin must
eventually grow fat again.
- Aurelle
